message:
fix(doctor,h1): test tempdir lifetime fix, formatting, and validate script

Doctor tests:
- Change temp.path() to temp.into_path() to prevent premature cleanup
  of tempdir during workspace scan (was causing flaky test failures)
- Fix scan_workspace() call to pass &root instead of owned path
- Update contention marker test fixtures to use actual variable bindings
  (lock_wait_ns, lock_hold_ns) instead of string comments

HTTP/1.1 client:
- Reformat headers_bytes iterator chain to single line (rustfmt)

package.json:
- Chain npm pack smoke test into validate script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
     "build:dev": "pnpm run build:wasm:dev && pnpm run build:packages",
     "clean": "bash scripts/clean_packages.sh",
     "typecheck": "pnpm -r run typecheck",
-    "validate": "bash scripts/validate_package_build.sh",
+    "validate": "bash scripts/validate_package_build.sh && bash scripts/validate_npm_pack_smoke.sh",
     "validate:next-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_next_turbopack_consumer.sh",
     "validate:vite-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_vite_vanilla_consumer.sh",
     "validate:webpack-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_webpack_consumer.sh"
